description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring green lawn areas and a few trees. The house has a flat roof and is divided into several rooms, each with visible interior walls and doorways. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with blue accents around the windows and doors, and the windows are symmetrically arranged. The property includes a paved walkway leading from the front gate to the main entrance, which is set back from the street. The yard is enclosed by a decorative metal fence, and there are two prominent trees, one in the front and one in the back yard. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on maximizing usable outdoor space.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed house with light-colored walls, blue window accents, and a fenced yard with trees and a paved walkway. The layout is rectangular and features a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, front yard, and a tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced yard, and the arrangement of rooms and windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear windows, and a tree at the back corner of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, fence, and the house's rectangular layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a paved walkway, no porch or overhang, and minimal decorative elements.
